task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal (e.g., using 'cat' or 'less'), or file viewer displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/upper_stage_specs.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the required propulsion hardware in GMAT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GMAT script code or GMAT GUI windows showing the creation and configuration of 'ChemicalTank', 'ChemicalThruster', and 'FiniteBurn' objects.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the correct burn initiation and termination conditions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GMAT script code or GUI elements showing the burn starting at Descending Node (True Anomaly / TA = 180.0 deg) and a stopping condition where the apoapsis radius reaches exactly 42164.14 km.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the GMAT script to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal command (like 'ls ~/GMAT_output/'), or editor title bar showing 'gto_injection.script' saved in the ~/GMAT_output/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the final report with the required metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of ~/GMAT_output/gto_injection_report.txt displayed on screen, containing 'burn_duration_seconds', 'final_apoapsis_km', and 'remaining_fuel_kg' with calculated values.

integrity.description: Verify that GMAT was actually used to compute the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the GMAT GUI running the simulation, or a terminal executing the GMAT command-line tool, rather than the agent just calculating numbers externally.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not hardcode the report values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal history or text editors to ensure the agent didn't just use 'echo' or a basic Python script to write guessed/calculated numbers directly into gto_injection_report.txt without running the GMAT script.

integrity.description: Ensure the script contains genuine GMAT syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of gto_injection.script to confirm it contains actual GMAT object definitions and mission sequence commands (e.g., 'Create Spacecraft', 'BeginMissionSequence', 'Maneuver').

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected final apoapsis radius is exactly 42164.14 km. A correct GMAT simulation should result in a burn duration between 290.0 and 320.0 seconds (approx 298.7s), and remaining fuel between 7400.0 and 7700.0 kg (approx 7553.7kg). The report must be saved at ~/GMAT_output/gto_injection_report.txt and the script at ~/GMAT_output/gto_injection.script.
